title: Implement Communication Patterns
description: Implement advanced communication patterns between worker threads using `MessageChannel`. Utilize `BroadcastChannel` for efficient many-to-many communication across multiple contexts. Design robust inter-thread coordination strategies for complex multi-threaded Node.js applications.
objectives: Implement advanced communication patterns between worker threads using `MessageChannel`.
Utilize `BroadcastChannel` for efficient many-to-many communication across multiple contexts.
Design robust inter-thread coordination strategies for complex multi-threaded Node.js applications.
